local_sources: Concordato plan, financial schedules and supporting accounting evidence
local_processing: Remove known local-path fields, known absolute path occurrences, and private QA text from the browser payload served through the loopback workbench, and require a per-session token for write operations

codex_context.purpose: Interpret plan assertions and explain numerical discrepancies
codex_context.content: Extracted plan sections, calculated tables, discrepancies, evidence locators and relevant original passages
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use extracted tables and discrepancy-linked passages; consult broader plan language only when interpretation depends on surrounding terms

residual_risks.risk: Plan passages and schedules can contain debtor, creditor and transaction-specific information
residual_risks.mitigation: Perform numerical tie-outs locally and expose only discrepancy-linked tables and passages

commercialista_notice.message_it: Tabelle e quadrature del piano vengono elaborate localmente. Codex esamina risultati, scostamenti e i passaggi del piano necessari a interpretarli, non l'intero fascicolo per impostazione predefinita.
commercialista_notice.message_en: Plan tables and tie-outs are processed locally. Codex reviews results, discrepancies and the plan passages needed to interpret them, not the complete file by default.

limitations: Some plan conclusions depend on language distributed across multiple sections
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
